sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἄγαβος

- Transliteration: Agabos

- Phonetic: ag'-ab-os

- Definition: Agabus = "locust"

1. a Christian prophet

- Origin: of hebrew origin, cf H2285

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin (compare [H2285]); Agabus an Israelite: - Agabus.
